section.div: 49% of my body is made of movies.

h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

div.div: Upgrade all types of structure to the maximum level.
In a BT area, cut an umbilical cord for the first time without the BT noticing.
Help porters through a MULE or terrorist area for the first time.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Watson.
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Santo Domingo.
Complete all gigs and NCPD Scanner Hustles in Pacifica.
Steal the Arasaka medical truck or deliver 10 vehicles to El Capitan.
RPG, Design & Illustration, Education, Web Publishing, Game Development
Complete Level 5 of an Escalation Contract set in the ICA Facility.
There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension
Future of the planet, and all that...
Make the right decision and go back to bed.
Enter GiGi's code without making a single mistake.
Harass Sherlock Holmes over the Telettrophone.
Make the wrong decision and risk the complete annihilation of the intergalactic universe.
Upgrade all types of structure to the maximum level.
In a BT area, cut an umbilical cord for the first time without the BT noticing.
Help porters through a MULE or terrorist area for the first time.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Complete 8 different levels sequentially under par time without dying on Ultra-Violence or higher.
Immolate a total of 30 arachnoid enemies with the Incinerator.
Obliterate 50 enemies with a single shot of the Calamity Blade.
